creator: nomadlogic@gmail.com
text:
Hello,
It looks like PR 187799:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=187799

Can be closed or updated.  By upgrading my kBuild port to:

kBuild-0.1.9998_2

virtualbox-ose now builds and works as expected.

Thanks!
-pete
